scripts.deploy: pnpm run build:web && pnpm --filter @markean/api exec wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:dry-run: pnpm run build:web && pnpm --filter @markean/api exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir ../../.wrangler-dry-run
scripts.d1:migrate:local: pnpm --filter @markean/api exec wrangler d1 migrations apply markean-api-dev --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: pnpm --filter @markean/api exec wrangler d1 migrations apply markean-api-prod --remote
